title: dicksonia squarrosa
intro: Dicksonia squarrosa, also known as the Rough Tree Fern, is a species of tree fern that is native to New Zealand and Australia. This plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antiseptic, and antimicrobial properties. The health benefits of Dicksonia squarrosa include reducing inflammation, soothing digestive issues, and supporting immune function. The plant is typically prepared as a tea or infused oil, although other herbal preparations, such as tinctures and salves, may also be used to harness its medicinal properties.
